title: Grilled Bass Skewers
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish featuring grilled sea bass, marinated in a mix of venezuelan spices.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and garlic powder

ingredients.name: Moist Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: to help retain moisture during grilling

instructions: 1. Soak skewers in water for 30 minutes.
3. In a bowl, mix venezuelan spices, moist breadcrumbs, and bouncy lemon juice.
4. Add sea bass pieces to the marinade and toss to coat.
5. Thread the marinated bass onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
6. Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
